# Hari Shewa Enterprises — MVM Aasanam

> Office furniture manufacturer and authorized dealer for Nilkamal, Supreme, and Seatex in Neemuch, Madhya Pradesh, India. Manufacturer of MVM Aasanam premium office furniture. ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001 certified. GeM empanelled. BIFMA certified. Established 1997. 50,000+ chairs delivered across Central India.

## Our Brands
- [MVM Aasanam — Own Brand](https://mvm-furniture.com/mvm): Premium office furniture manufactured in Neemuch. Executive chairs, ergonomic task chairs, cafeteria furniture, visitor and reception seating.
- [Nilkamal Furniture — Authorized Dealer](https://mvm-furniture.com/nilkamal): Complete Nilkamal range. Plastic chairs, Freedom Series storage cabinets, dining sets, office chairs, outdoor furniture.
- [Supreme Furniture — Dealer](https://mvm-furniture.com/supreme): Supreme moulded plastic furniture. Seating, tables, storage, kids range.
- [Seatex Seating — Dealer](https://mvm-furniture.com/seatex): Premium and standard line chairs, tables, stools.

## MVM Aasanam Product Categories
- [Executive Chairs](https://mvm-furniture.com/mvm/executive-chairs): Premium leather chairs for cabins and boardrooms
- [Ergonomic Task Chairs](https://mvm-furniture.com/mvm/ergonomic-task-chairs): All-day comfort with lumbar support and mesh back
- [Cafeteria Furniture](https://mvm-furniture.com/mvm/cafeteria-furniture): Durable stackable chairs and tables for canteens
- [Visitor & Reception](https://mvm-furniture.com/mvm/visitor-and-reception): Stylish visitor chairs and reception furniture

- Location: Industrial Area, Neemuch, Madhya Pradesh 458441, India

- Service area: Madhya Pradesh, Rajasthan, Gujarat, Maharashtra, Chhattisgarh (pan-India for institutional)
- Specializes in bulk and institutional supply for corporates, government offices, hospitals, schools
- Payment: Bank Transfer, UPI, Cheque, Demand Draft
